title: lepidium pollichii
intro: Lepidium pollichii, also known as peppery lepidium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a type of wild mustard that is native to Europe and Asia, and is known for its spicy, peppery flavor. Lepidium pollichii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a spice in culinary preparations.
